greeting: I can help you create powerful custom column expressions for your HCM reports. Tell me what data you want to calculate or transform, and I'll guide you through building the expression.

suggestedPrompts.title: Annualized Hourly Pay
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I need to calculate the annualized pay for hourly employees. Can you help me write an expression that multiplies 'Hourly Pay' by 2080 (40 hours/week, 52 weeks/year)?

suggestedPrompts.title: Employee Pay Status
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Create a new column that shows 'Salaried' if the 'Pay Type' is 'Salaried', and 'Hourly' otherwise.

suggestedPrompts.title: Years of Service
suggestedPrompts.prompt: I want to calculate the years of service for each employee based on their 'Hire Date' and today's date, rounded to two decimal places.

suggestedPrompts.title: Full Employee Identifier
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Combine 'Employee Name' and 'Employee ID' into a single column, formatted as 'Name (ID)'.

suggestedPrompts.title: Total Benefit Cost
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Calculate the total benefit cost by summing 'Scheduled EE Amount' and 'Scheduled ER Amount'.

suggestedPrompts.title: LOTO Authorized Check
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Create a new column that indicates 'True' if an employee's 'Training Profile' includes 'LOTO Authorized', and 'False' otherwise.
